title: Set up billing and usage alerts

blocks.content:
Cost management is essential for sustainable observability operations. Grafana Cloud provides usage and cost alerts that notify you when consumption approaches or exceeds predefined thresholds, helping prevent unexpected charges and enabling proactive budget management.

You create these alerts in the **Usage Alerts** tab of the Cost Management and Billing app. To create alerts, you need the permissions granted by the **Usage alerts admin** role.
Optional: open the docs for managing access to the Cost Management and Billing app in a new browser tab.

blocks.title: Create a cost or usage alert

blocks.content: In this section, you'll open the alert builder, choose what to monitor, set a budget, and pick where Grafana sends the notification.
Pop this guide out into a floating window so it stays visible when the **Create alert** menu opens.
Go to the **Usage Alerts** tab of the Cost Management and Billing app.
Click **+ Create alert** to open the alert builder.
Select **All Products** for a monthly organization spend alert, or pick **Metrics**, **Logs**, or **Traces** for a product-specific alert.
Enter your monthly budget in US dollars (USD), for example `1000`.
If a **Contact point** field is shown, scroll to it and choose where Grafana sends the notification. If you don't have one yet, use **View or create contact points** to set one up.
Review your settings, then click **Create alerts** to save.
You created a usage alert that monitors spend against your threshold and notifies the contact point you chose.
Dock this guide back to the sidebar to continue to the next milestone.
To review or change an alert later, return to the **Usage Alerts** tab and select it.
Optional: open the docs for managing existing usage alerts in a new browser tab.
In the next milestone, you'll discover additional learning paths to expand your Grafana Cloud expertise.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Understand your Grafana Cloud invoice](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/cost-management-and-billing/understand-your-invoice/)
- [Grafana alerting documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/alerting-and-irm/alerting/)
